description_long: This is a single-story wooden bungalow with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal light wood siding, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The front facade features a covered porch supported by sturdy wooden posts, and a set of double doors with glass panels provides entry. Large barn-style doors are visible on one side, suggesting a garage or storage area integrated into the structure. Windows are minimal and asymmetrically placed, with a small window on the rear and a larger set near the entrance. The foundation appears to be made of brick or stone, elevating the structure slightly above ground level.
description: A single-story wooden bungalow with a red gable roof, covered porch, and barn-style side doors. The exterior features light wood siding and minimal, asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, double glass doors, and part of the side wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large barn-style doors and the gable end of the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden siding with no visible doors or windows.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end with a small window and no entry points.
